pr.title: Record: Combined 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Polar Express + Brotli — val_bpb 1.1067 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Merges 3-layer depth recurrence with parallel residual start plus Polar Express NS prep and Brotli compression for a clean quantized stack.
techniques: 3-layer depth recurrence replay with layer7 parallel residuals
Polar Express Newton-Schulz steps preceded by MuonEq-R normalization
Brotli + byte-shuffle compression with GPTQ int6
